Klasse Stone

java.lang.Object
boardLogic.Stone
public class Stone extends Object
Represents a stone in the game, which is owned by a player and placed on a node.

  • Feldübersicht

    Felder
    Modifizierer und Typ

    currentNode
     
    private PlayerEntity

    Modifizierer und Typ
    Methode
    Beschreibung
    Stone
    deepCopy(PlayerEntity newOwner)
    Creates a deep copy of this stone, assigning a new owner reference.

    getNode()
    Getter for the node the stone currently is placed on.

    Getter for the owner of the stone.

    setNode(Node node)
    Sets the node the stone is placed on.

    Von Klasse geerbte Methoden java.lang.Object

  • Felddetails

    • owner

      private PlayerEntity owner

    • currentNode

      private Node currentNode

  • Konstruktordetails

    • Stone

      public Stone(PlayerEntity owner)
      Creates a stone and sets its owner.
      Parameter:
      owner - The player that owns this stone.

  • Methodendetails

    • setNode

      public void setNode(Node node)
      Sets the node the stone is placed on.
      Parameter:
      node - The target node.

    • getNode

      public Node getNode()
      Getter for the node the stone currently is placed on.
      Gibt zurück:
      The current node.

    • getOwner

      public PlayerEntity getOwner()
      Getter for the owner of the stone.
      Gibt zurück:
      The owner of the stone.

    • deepCopy

      public Stone deepCopy(PlayerEntity newOwner)
      Creates a deep copy of this stone, assigning a new owner reference.
      Parameter:
      newOwner - The copied player to whom the new stone will belong.
      Gibt zurück:
      A deep copy of this stone.
